---
title: Tobias Cindergate
type: person
aliases: [tobias]
summary: Founder of Mosslight.
---

Tobias Cindergate is the founder of Mosslight. Tobias shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Oskar Pemberlake
type: person
aliases: [oskar]
summary: Founder of Frostpetal Systems.
---

Oskar Pemberlake is the founder of Frostpetal Systems. Oskar flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

---
title: Mosslight
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Tobias Cindergate.
---

Mosslight is a seed-stage company. Founded by Tobias Cindergate. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Foxglove Capital
type: org
summary: Early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.
---

Foxglove Capital is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Tobias Cindergate and Oskar Pemberlake both want Foxglove Capital in the Mosslight round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
